# Pull Request

## Summary
<!-- What changed and why. 1-3 bullets. Link the bead ID. -->

## Test plan
<!-- Bulleted checklist of how this was verified. -->

## Checklist
- [ ] Bead linked in the commit message (`[bd-xxxxx]`).
- [ ] Tests updated or added (backend `pytest`, frontend `vitest`).
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (Added / Changed / Deprecated / Removed / Fixed / Security). See [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/). Skip only for docs-only, test-only, or CI-only changes — note the reason.
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour or interfaces changed (`docs/`, runbooks, ADRs).
